# RK Online — MBBS Abroad Consultancy

## About
RK Online is an education consultancy helping Indian students pursue MBBS at NMC-approved universities in Kazakhstan. We offer direct university tie-ups, end-to-end admission support, and mentorship from seniors who studied at our partner universities.

## Primary Partner
Shokan Ualikhanov Kokshetau State University, Kazakhstan (Est. 1962)

## Services
- MBBS admission counseling for Kazakhstan
- Document verification and submission
- Visa processing assistance
- Travel and accommodation arrangements
- On-ground mentorship and support
- FMGE preparation guidance

## Contact
Website: https://rkonline.in
Phone: Available on website
WhatsApp: Available on website
